description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu Release that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a matrix job that builds and tests on ubuntu-20.04 with two Elasticsearch services (versions 8.11.1 and 7.17.15) running in the background. Install dependencies, checkout code with submodules, configure the build with CMake, load and use a ccache cache, build the project, run unit tests, and perform additional tests for program arguments and node functionality.
